tasks.description: 1.2 Implement `BUILD_PROCESS_TABLE` and `BUILD_PROCESS_TREE` to construct the core graphs with composite keys (`machine|pid`).
1.3 Implement clock skew (`CHECK_CLOCK_SKEW`) and log gap (`CHECK_LOG_GAPS`) pre-flight checks.
2.2 Implement `ENRICH_REGISTRY` (Event 4657) correlation logic with L1/L2/L3 cascade joins.
2.3 Implement User Session integration (`BUILD_TIMELINE`) using Event 4624.
2.4 Implement anomaly detectors (PPID Spoofing, LOLBins, UAC Token Split).
3.1 Update `normalize/events.py` to extract necessary XML attributes (e.g., `ThreadID`, `EventRecordID`).
3.2 Refactor `stream_evtx` in `server.py` to pipe normalized events through the `CorrelationEngine` before yielding SSE chunks.
4.1 Update `app.js` state management to map nodes via composite `process_key` instead of bare `pid`.
4.2 Update D3.js rendering logic to display new node types gracefully based on the enriched `TimelineRow` data.
4.3 Add visual indicators (e.g., tooltip tags, varying stroke colors) for detected anomalies (PPID Spoofing, Logon Mismatch).

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
